name: Shopify
recommendedFor: Merchants launching or scaling an online store
notRecommendedFor: Teams that only need a content blog
reviewNotes: Verify current plan names and regional pricing before publishing.

name: Klaviyo
recommendedFor: DTC brands with repeat purchase potential
notRecommendedFor: Tiny lists that only need basic newsletters
reviewNotes: Model pricing with real contact count, email volume, and SMS volume.

name: Omnisend
recommendedFor: Stores that want approachable retention workflows
notRecommendedFor: Advanced lifecycle teams that need deep customer data modeling
reviewNotes: Verify contact tiers, monthly email send limits, SMS terms, and current plan names.

name: Postscript
recommendedFor: Shopify brands treating SMS as a serious owned channel
notRecommendedFor: Stores that only need basic email newsletters
reviewNotes: Verify current usage billing, carrier fee handling, compliance requirements, and latest product-update page.

name: Gorgias
recommendedFor: Growing stores with repeat support tickets
notRecommendedFor: Stores with very low ticket volume
reviewNotes: Verify current ticket-volume pricing and AI automation limits before publishing.

name: Semrush
recommendedFor: Stores and agencies investing in organic search
notRecommendedFor: Teams that only need marketplace keyword data
reviewNotes: Verify plan names, project limits, user limits, and toolkit availability before publishing.

name: Zapier
recommendedFor: Teams connecting store, marketing, and operations tools
reviewNotes: Verify task limits, app access, AI features, and plan automation limits before publishing.

name: Ahrefs
recommendedFor: SEO teams and stores investing in content-led growth
notRecommendedFor: Teams that only need basic rank checks
reviewNotes: Verify current credit limits, project limits, and pricing model before publishing.
